{{Quote|Stand aside ... I want Solo's full attention.|Gamine|<ref name="The Constancia Affair" />}}
'''Gamine''' was a [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] [[Constancian]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
===The Constancia affair===
Gamine was on her way back home with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] after she discovered a way to save her people from the Empire. When they emerged from hyperspace, the Imperials blasted their ship, but not before Luke jettisoned [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] where he knew [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] would find them.<ref name="The Constancia Affair" />

While Gamine was away, the Empire came to [[Constancia/Legends|her planet]] and discovered that the Constancians had telepathic powers. They threatened to destroy their planet if they did not put their ability to their disposal.<ref name="The Constancia Affair" />

Luke and Gamine escaped the exploding craft in a [[Escape pod/Legends|lifepod]]. A person named [[Sharlee]], who was in [[Outpost 8]] at the time, [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor-beamed]] Luke and Gamine to the Outpost. She agreed to help put Gamine's plan into action.<ref name="The Constancia Affair" />

When Han Solo, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], C-3PO, R2-D2, and [[Gyla Petro]] landed in Outpost 8, Gamine begged Han to help fight off the Empire. He agreed to help, but only because it was convenient for him. Han and Sharlee took a lifepod and made sure it was boarded by Imperials. Then, they fought them off with [[battle armor]].<ref name="The Constancia Affair" />

On the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], Luke, Gamine, C-3PO, R2-D2, and Gyla fought off the Imperials guarding the planet while Han and Sharlee took a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] and began to shoot down the rest. Two ships made it past Han and close to the ''Falcon'', but Luke got into Gunport 2 and shot down one while Planetary defenses got the other. Gamine then commented on the hero's welcome she would receive when she got home.<ref name="The Constancia Affair" />

==Appearances==
*"[[The Constancia Affair]]" {{Reprint|The Constancia Affair}} {{1st}}
